In under 5 minutes, the Shutdown Ritual helps you:

Built for knowledge workers, solopreneurs, and anyone who wants to stop carrying the weight of an unfinished day into their personal time.
Enhanced tab management for Chrome and Edge

TabFlow is a lightweight yet powerful tab management extension that helps you tame browser chaos. With the global search panel,
  instantly find any open tab by title, URL, or domain with real-time filtering. The built-in smart classification feature groups  
  your tabs into Chrome Tab Groups by category — Work, Dev, Social, Shopping, and more — with a single click. Need smarter sorting?
   Connect any OpenAI-compatible AI model for intelligent auto-classification. Accidentally closed something important? Restore    
  recently closed tabs in one click. TabFlow respects your workflow: choose light, dark, or system theme, switch between English
  and Chinese, and set custom keyboard shortcuts. If you regularly juggle dozens of tabs and struggle to stay organized, TabFlow
  brings the order you need. Install now and take control of your tabs.
Visual tab management with grid view, smart organizing, shortcuts, and session saving. Cloud sync available.

Take control of your browser tabs with Sant Tabs - a powerful, privacy-focused tab management extension that helps you organize, navigate, and manage hundreds of tabs effortlessly.

**VISUAL TAB MANAGEMENT**

- Grid View: See all your tabs at a glance with beautiful favicon previews arranged in a clean grid layout
- Map View: Visualize your tabs spatially with a unique bird's-eye map showing tab relationships
- List View: Classic compact list with full tab titles for quick scanning
- Full Tab View: Detailed view showing page previews and extended information
- Window Sections: Tabs organized by window with customizable window names
- Stats Bar: Live count of total tabs, windows, duplicates, and same-site tabs

**SMART ORGANIZATION**

- AI Smart Organize: Automatically categorize tabs into intelligent groups (Shopping, Social, Development, News, Research, Entertainment, etc.) powered by Google Gemini
- Group by Site: One-click grouping of all tabs from the same domain
- Duplicate Detection: Instantly find and close duplicate tabs to reduce clutter
- Chrome Tab Groups: Native integration with Chrome's built-in tab groups
- Custom Rules: Create your own organization rules based on URL patterns

**KEYBOARD-FIRST DESIGN**

- Full keyboard navigation - never touch your mouse
- Quick Search: Press "/" to instantly filter tabs by title or URL
- Arrow keys to navigate, Enter to switch
- "D" to find duplicates
- "G" to trigger Smart Organize
- "S" to save current window as a collection
- Customizable shortcut: Ctrl+Shift+Space (Cmd+Shift+Space on Mac) to open Sant Tabs

**SESSION MANAGEMENT**

- Collections: Save complete window sessions with all tabs preserved
- Quick Save: One-click save of any window state
- Restore Sessions: Reopen saved collections exactly as they were
- Schedule Tabs: Set tabs to reopen at specific times (great for reminders)
- Tab Suspension: Automatically suspend inactive tabs to save memory and battery

**LOCAL-FIRST PRIVACY**

- All core features work locally on your device
- No tracking, no analytics, no data collection
- No account required for all core features
- Open and transparent about exactly what we access
- Premium cloud sync is entirely optional and user-controlled

**CORE FEATURES (No Account Required)**

- Unlimited Collections: Save as many sessions as you need
- Unlimited Scheduled Items: Schedule tabs without limits
- All local features, no limits

**PREMIUM FEATURES (Optional - $9.99 one-time)**

- AI Smart Organize: Automatically categorize tabs using Google Gemini AI
- Cloud Sync: Sync your collections and settings across all your devices
- One-time payment, lifetime access, no subscriptions

**7 BEAUTIFUL THEMES**

- Midnight: Deep dark theme with indigo accents (default)
- Monokai: Classic developer theme with green accents
- Dracula: Popular purple-tinted dark theme
- Solarized: The iconic teal color scheme
- Nord: Arctic, bluish color palette
- Matrix: Hacker-style green on black
- Claude: Light theme with warm terracotta accents

**DESIGNED FOR POWER USERS**

- Researchers managing dozens of reference tabs
- Developers juggling multiple projects and documentation
- Writers organizing research materials
- Students with course materials across subjects
- Professionals with many work tools open
- Anyone who accumulates tabs and needs control

**LIGHTWEIGHT AND FAST**

- Minimal memory footprint
- Instant popup opening
- Efficient background processing
- No performance impact on your browsing

**PERMISSIONS EXPLAINED**

We believe in transparency. Here's exactly why we need each permission:

- tabs: Core functionality - we need this to read tab titles, URLs, and favicons to display them in Sant Tabs. This information is only used locally and is never transmitted to any server.

- tabGroups: Required to create and manage Chrome Tab Groups when you use Smart Organize or Group by Site features.

- storage: Saves your preferences, themes, custom rules, and collections locally on your device.

- alarms: Enables scheduled tab reopening and automatic tab suspension after periods of inactivity.

- scripting + host permissions: Required to execute a local script that extracts page text (meta descriptions and paragraphs) ONLY when you explicitly trigger AI Smart Organize. This allows intelligent tab categorization. No data is sent unless you use this feature.

- identity: Enables Google Sign-In for premium cloud sync. Only activated when you explicitly click "Sign in with Google" - no authentication requests are made otherwise.

**ABOUT US**

Sant Tabs is built by a solo developer in New Zealand focused on creating thoughtful, privacy-respecting productivity tools. We use Sant Tabs every day and build features we genuinely need.

Chrome extension to quickly open configured URLs

# Linkera - Quick Access to Your Favorite Links

**Stop wasting time searching for bookmarks. Access your most-used links instantly with a single keyboard shortcut.**

## Why Linkera?

How many times a day do you open the same websites? Gmail, Slack, GitHub, your company dashboard... Every click adds up. Linkera puts all your essential links one shortcut away.

**Press `Cmd+Shift+L` (Mac) or `Ctrl+Shift+L` (Windows)** and your links appear instantly.

## Key Features

### Instant Access
- Open any link with a keyboard shortcut - no mouse needed
- Clean, fast popup that stays out of your way
- Pin important links to the top for quick access
- Toggle visibility to hide links you don't need right now

### Smart Link Groups
- Organize related links into groups (e.g., "Google" → Calendar, Drive, Docs)
- Open all links in a group as Chrome Tab Groups with one click
- Color-code your groups for quick visual recognition

### Domain Labels
- See a subtle label when you're on a registered site
- Always know which project or context you're working in

### Simple Setup
- Import from CSV or configure manually
- Drag and drop to reorder
- Sync across devices with Chrome

## Perfect For

- **Developers** - Quick access to GitHub repos, CI/CD dashboards, documentation. **Group your environment URLs** (local, staging, production) for the same project and switch between them instantly.
- **Product Managers** - Jump between Jira, Confluence, analytics tools
- **Anyone** who visits the same sites multiple times a day

One click opens all environments as a Tab Group. Color-code them to never deploy to the wrong environment again.

## Privacy First

- All data stored locally in your browser
- No external servers, no tracking, no ads

---

**Install now and reclaim your time.**


---
## Changelog 

### v0.2.0

New Features
  - Import from Tabs — One-click import of currently open Chrome tabs into Linkera. Tab groups are mapped to Linkera groups (max 3 children), ungrouped tabs become individual links. Duplicate URLs are
  automatically skipped.
  - Toast Notifications — Animated notification banner (top-right) for all major actions: tab import, CSV/TSV import, reset, recovery, and settings changes.

Improvements
  - Default "Show domain label" setting changed to OFF.

Nvimux brings (n)vim-style keyboard navigation to Chrome.
Navigate the web entirely with your keyboard using familiar keybindings.

Features:
- Scroll with j/k, jump to top/bottom with g/G, half-page with Ctrl+D/U
- Hop mode (Ctrl+E) — jump to any link with color-coded hints
- Page find (Ctrl+F) and web search (Ctrl+G) with history & suggestions
- Workspace (Ctrl+W), tab delete (Ctrl+X), change tabs (;)
- Tab history navigation with Ctrl+I / Ctrl+O
- Tab switching with Ctrl+H / Ctrl+L
- Link navigation with Ctrl+J / Ctrl+K

All navigation runs locally — no data is collected or sent anywhere.
Local-first browsing analytics + one-click tab organizer for Chrome. Replace your new tab, see where your hours actually go.

See where your time actually goes online.

SiteLogs is a Chrome extension that quietly records how long you spend
on each website — locally, on your machine. Replaces your new tab with
a personal dashboard, organizes 47 stale tabs in one click, and never
sends a byte anywhere.

Save, organize and restore tab sessions with Tab Groups, cloud sync, categories, snooze and more. Your tabs deserve a safe haven.

TabHaven is the modern tab session manager that actually preserves your Chrome Tab Groups.

SAVE YOUR TABS INSTANTLY
One click to save all open tabs as a named session. Use Ctrl+Shift+S for quick save without even opening the popup. Every session remembers tab titles, URLs, favicons, pinned tabs, and your Chrome Tab Group names and colors.

RESTORE WITH TAB GROUPS
When you restore a session, your tabs come back exactly as they were — including Tab Groups with their original names and colors. Restoring runs in the background so all tabs open reliably, even for 50+ tab sessions.

CATEGORIES (PRO)
Organize sessions into color-coded categories like Work, Personal, Research. Create and manage categories from the dedicated Categories panel. Filter sessions by category with one click.

CLOUD SYNC (PRO)
Sessions automatically sync across all Chrome browsers where you're logged in with the same Google account. Push, pull, or delete cloud data from Settings. Zero external servers — uses Chrome's native sync.

SMART FEATURES
- Search — Find any tab across all sessions by title, URL, or group name
- Snooze — Postpone a session for 30 min, 1h, 2h, 4h, 8h, or tomorrow. It re-opens automatically
- Rename — Click the pencil icon to rename any session
- Duplicate Detection — Spot tabs that appear in multiple sessions
- Import from OneTab — Paste your OneTab export and migrate in seconds
- Export/Import JSON — Full backup and restore of all your data

BUILT FOR PRODUCTIVITY
- Auto-save on browser close (never lose tabs to a crash again)
- Close current tabs on restore (clean workspace switch)
- Color-coded sessions and categories
- Pinned tab support
- Keyboard shortcut: Ctrl+Shift+S / Cmd+Shift+S
- Built-in help page explaining every feature

FREE & PRO
- Free: Up to 10 sessions with all core features
- Pro ($2/month): Unlimited sessions, categories, cloud sync

YOUR DATA STAYS SAFE
All data is stored locally. Cloud sync uses Chrome's built-in sync — no external servers. Strict Content Security Policy. All inputs validated and sanitized. Zero tracking, zero analytics, zero ads.

Lightweight session manager for Chrome's native tab groups. Save and restore tab group snapshots with ease.

Tab Snaps - The Ultimate Tab Group Session Manager

Transform your browsing experience with Tab Snaps, a lightweight extension that works exclusively with Chrome's native Tab Groups. Save and restore your organized tab collections with just a right-click!

🚀 Key Features:
• One-Click Snapshots: Right-click any tab group and select "Take Snapshot"
• Instant Restore: Restore any snapshot to a new window with original grouping
• Preserves Everything: Maintains tab group colors, names, and organization
• Local Storage: All data stored securely on your device - complete privacy
• Clean Interface: Simple popup to view and manage all your snapshots

🔒 Privacy First:
• No data collection or tracking
• Everything stored locally on your device
• No external servers or cloud storage
• Open source and transparent

🎯 Perfect For:
• Researchers managing multiple projects
• Developers working on different codebases
• Students organizing study materials
• Anyone who uses Chrome's tab groups

How to Use:
1. Group your tabs using Chrome's native tab grouping
2. Right-click anywhere and select "📸 Take Snapshot"
3. View all snapshots by clicking the extension icon
4. Click any snapshot to restore it in a new window

Why Tab Snaps?
Unlike other session managers, Tab Snaps works seamlessly with Chrome's built-in tab groups. No learning curve, no complex setup - just simple, powerful tab management.

Start organizing your browsing today with Tab Snaps!
Automatic tab grouping with rules, duplicate prevention, and resource monitoring.

Takt — Your tabs, sorted. Automatically.

Tab chaos, solved. Rule-based tab grouping, duplicate blocking, hibernation, and sessions. No account, no tracking, nothing leaves Chrome.

Set rules once. Every tab lands in the right group the moment it opens. Duplicate tabs get closed before they accumulate. Idle tabs sleep to free memory. Your workspace saves as named sessions you can restore later. Everything runs locally: no account, no server, nothing leaves your browser.

✨ Free Features: Useful from day one

📂 Tab Grouping
Create up to 5 rules matching tabs by URL. Contains, exact, or domain match. Tabs are filed into named, color-coded Chrome groups automatically on load. Drag rules to set priority: first match wins.

⚡️One-click when you need it
One-click/shortcut Group All, Ungroup All, Collapse All, Expand All. Per-window grouping keeps each window independent. Built-in rule tester: paste a URL and verify which rule fires before you open a single tab.

🧠 Smart Suggestions
Takt watches your ungrouped tabs and your browsing history. When it spots a domain cluster, it suggests a rule. Accept or dismiss — your choice.

❄️ Manual Hibernation
Fully close any tab to reclaim memory. Takt saves its URL, title, and group. Wake it with one click and it returns exactly where you left it.

🔒 Privacy
Your tabs are your business. Takt never phones home.

💎 Premium Features — $3/month or $30/year (save 2 months)     

🚀 Advanced Rules
Unlimited rules. Glob and Regex matching. Match by page title, not just URL. Combine conditions with AND/OR logic. All 8 Chrome group colors. Match statistics show how many tabs each rule has processed over time.

🚫 Duplicate Prevention
Open the same URL twice? Takt closes the duplicate and returns focus to the original — silently. Five URL normalization strategies handle query strings, fragments, and trailing slashes. Override anytime with Shift+click or right-click.

❄️ Hibernation — Automatic
Set idle thresholds or a total tab ceiling. Takt hibernates tabs that qualify automatically, per your rules. State is fully preserved. Wake any hibernated tab in one click or with Quick Switch.

🔎 Quick Switch + History Search
Press Alt+Shift+Space anywhere in Chrome, including restricted pages like chrome://extensions. A fuzzy-search overlay appears. Search all open tabs by title or URL, navigate with arrow keys, jump with Enter. Includes results to hibernated tabs and your full browsing history. No mouse required.

💾 Sessions
Snapshot all open tab groups into a named session. Restore later in a new window or replace the current one. Up to 50 sessions stored locally.

📈 Resource Dashboard
Per-tab memory measurement. Per-group health scores (A–F) based on memory, idle time, and background activity. Set memory budgets, Takt auto-discards tabs that exceed them. Background network request detection. System memory indicator. No external services.

👤 Profiles & Schedules
Create named rule sets for Work, Personal, Research — any context you need. Switch in one click from the popup, or schedule automatic switching by time of day and day of week.

🔄 Sync
Export your full configuration — rules, settings, profiles — as a single JSON file. Import on any machine. Or connect a watched folder (Google Drive, Dropbox, iCloud) for automatic background sync. Direct Google Drive integration available.

📂 Group Actions
Close, bookmark, or move an entire tab group in one click. From the options page or the right-click menu.

🖱️Context Menu Rule Creation
Right-click any tab. Choose "Create rule from this tab." Takt prefills the URL pattern and group name. Done in five seconds.

⌨️ Keyboard shortcuts
  -Group All: Alt+Shift+G
  - Ungroup All: Alt+Shift+U
  - Collapse All: Alt+Shift+C
  - Quick Switch: Alt+Shift+Space
  - Expand All: Assignable in chrome://extensions/shortcuts
  - Right-click "Create rule from this tab": Pre-fills a new rule from the current tab's URL.
  - All shortcuts are remappable in Chrome settings.

🔒Privacy
All data stays in your browser. The only outbound request is license validation for paid features. No analytics. No telemetry. No accounts.

Built independently. No VC funding. No growth team. Your tabs are nobody's business but yours.
AI tab manager: smart grouping, tab snooze, spaces, focus mode, AI search & summarize, dark mode.

Organize research into Spaces, highlight text, and manage tab groups.

TabVault is the ultimate all-in-one workspace for researchers, students, and writers. It’s more than just a tab manager—it’s a digital vault that captures your ideas, organizes your references into Spaces, and uses AI to help you turn those references into finished drafts.

🚀 Key Features
- Organize into Spaces: Group related tabs, links, and documents, into dedicated "Spaces" for different projects.

- Highlight & Capture: Highlight critical text directly on any webpage. TabVault automatically stores these snippets and links them back to the original source.

- Smart Tab Groups: Effortlessly manage dozens of tabs. Save and restore spaces into clean tab groups with one click to keep your browser fast and your mind focused.

- One-Click Navigation: Reopen all your stored references instantly. TabVault navigates you back to the exact page and highlight you saved.

- Declutter Your Browser: Reduce memory usage and mental fatigue by stashing inactive tabs in your vault without losing your place.

Why Choose TabVault?
Whether you’re a content creator building a script, a student writing a thesis, or a professional managing multiple projects, TabVault bridges the gap between finding information and creating value.

🚧 Coming soon
AI space summarisation, content creator script writing and much more. 

Stop searching, start creating. Install TabVault today and build your ultimate research space.

Easily group selected tabs or add a tab to an existing group using Chrome's native tab grouping.

Tab Grouper is a Chrome extension designed to help you efficiently organize and manage your browser tabs. With Tab Grouper, you can easily create tab groups, assign tabs to groups, rename and color groups, and move tabs between groups using drag and drop. The extension also allows you to export and import your tab sessions (all tabs, grouped, or ungrouped) for backup or transfer between devices. Its user-friendly interface includes features like multi-selection, badges showing the number of tabs and groups, and full support for both English and French languages. Tab Grouper is ideal for users who work with many tabs and want to boost their productivity by keeping their browsing organized.
Auto-group, summarize, and focus your tabs — 100% on your device, private and secure.

Take back control of your browser with TabSage. 

Are you overwhelmed by too many open tabs? TabSage is a hyper-fast, deeply secure tab manager that uses 100% on-device AI to organize your digital life. 

Features:
✨ Auto-Grouping: Automatically sorts chaotic tabs into color-coded groups based on their topic (Development, Shopping, Research, etc.).
🔒 100% Privacy: TabSage uses Local AI processing. Your tabs, history, and reading materials never leave your device. Zero cloud servers.

Supercharge your browser today with TabSage!
tmux-inspired tab group manager. Organize tabs with keyboard shortcuts: Alt+Shift+G to group, Alt+Shift+0-9 to switch.

TabMUX is a tmux-inspired keyboard interface for Chrome Tab Groups.
Create groups, jump between them, and move tabs—all without touching the mouse.

Privacy note: TabMUX never collects, stores, or transmits any user data.
Everything runs locally in your browser.

Quick Start

- Alt+Shift+G — Create a new tab group (or move the active tab into a new group)
- Alt+Shift+0–9 — Focus the corresponding numbered group
- Alt+Shift+M, then 0–9 — Move the active tab into a group

Keyboard Shortcuts
Group management

- Alt+Shift+G — Create a new tab group
- Alt+Shift+0 — Focus group 0
- Alt+Shift+1 — Focus group 1
- Alt+Shift+2 — Focus group 2
- Alt+Shift+3 — Focus group 3
- Alt+Shift+4 — Focus group 4
- Alt+Shift+5 — Focus group 5
- Alt+Shift+6 — Focus group 6
- Alt+Shift+7 — Focus group 7
- Alt+Shift+8 — Focus group 8
- Alt+Shift+9 — Focus group 9

Move mode (move tabs between groups)
- Alt+Shift+M, then 0 — Move active tab to group 0
- Alt+Shift+M, then 1 — Move active tab to group 1
- Alt+Shift+M, then 2 — Move active tab to group 2
- Alt+Shift+M, then 3 — Move active tab to group 3
- Alt+Shift+M, then 4 — Move active tab to group 4
- Alt+Shift+M, then 5 — Move active tab to group 5
- Alt+Shift+M, then 6 — Move active tab to group 6
- Alt+Shift+M, then 7 — Move active tab to group 7
- Alt+Shift+M, then 8 — Move active tab to group 8
- Alt+Shift+M, then 9 — Move active tab to group 9
- Esc — Cancel move mode

Notes
- Shortcuts use the Alt+Shift+X pattern throughout.
- Some pages (e.g. chrome:// and the Chrome Web Store) do not allow extensions to run scripts.

Perfect for:

Salesforce OrgPilot: An Extension for environment watermarks and fast navigation in Salesforce orgs.

Salesforce OrgPilot
A browser extension (Manifest V3) for Chrome and Firefox that provides environment identification watermarks and quick navigation for Salesforce orgs.

Features
Environment Watermark
Automatically displays a watermark identifying whether you're in Production or a Sandbox (showing the sandbox name). The watermark appears on page load so you can verify your environment at a glance, then disappears on your first click or keypress to stay out of the way. It reappears on the next page load.

Customizable via the options page:

Setting	Default	Range
Font size	120px	50-300px
Opacity	20%	5-50%
Production color	#ff4444 (red)	Any hex color
Sandbox color	#006600 (green)	Any hex color
Position	Diagonal	Diagonal, Top Left, Top Right, Top Center, Center
Omnibox Quick Navigation
Type sf in the browser address bar followed by a target to quickly navigate anywhere in your Salesforce org. Single-word commands default to production; prefix with a sandbox name to target a sandbox.

sf <target>                    # goes to production (current tab)
sf <sandbox> <target>          # goes to a sandbox (current tab)
sf *<sandbox> <target>         # opens in a new tab
sf **<sandbox> <target>        # opens in a new window
Environments:

Single word defaults to production (e.g., sf cases → prod cases)
Two words: first word is the sandbox name (e.g., sf dev cases → dev sandbox cases)
Tab/Window behavior:

No prefix — navigates in the current tab (default)
* prefix — opens in a new tab (e.g., sf *dev cases)
** prefix — opens in a new window (e.g., sf **dev cases)
Targets:

Target	Destination
admin	Setup Home
flow / flows	Flow Builder
login	Base URL / login page for the org
copy	Current page in another environment
sandbox	Sandbox creation page
devops	DevOps Center (production only)
Custom target name	User-defined path (see Custom Targets)
Any object name (e.g., account, contact)	Recent list view for that object
15 or 18-character Salesforce ID	Direct record navigation
Examples:

sf account            → Production Account list
sf flow               → Production Flow Builder
sf admin              → Production Setup Home
sf 001xx000003DGbY    → Navigate directly to a production record
sf login              → Production base URL
sf dev login          → Dev sandbox base URL
sf dive copy          → Open current page in dive sandbox
sf copy               → Open current page in production
sf dev flow           → Dev sandbox Flow Builder
sf qa admin           → QA sandbox Setup Home
sf dev 001xx000003DGbY   → Navigate to a record in dev sandbox
sf *prod admin           → Production Setup Home in a new tab
sf **dev cases           → Dev sandbox cases in a new window
sf users                 → Custom target "users" in production
sf dev users             → Custom target "users" in dev sandbox
Popup Dashboard
Click the extension icon to open a quick-access popup with:

Environment selector — Switch between Production and your configured sandboxes with one click. The selected environment is remembered across popup opens.
Navigate buttons — Admin, Flows, Sandbox, DevOps on the first row; Login and Copy on the second. Copy takes the current tab's page and opens it in the selected environment.
Custom targets — Any custom targets you've configured appear in their own section.
Recent Pages — Shows the last 5 Salesforce pages you visited, with relative timestamps ("just now", "5m ago", "2h ago"). Click any entry to navigate back. Respects the open-in dropdown.
Quick Nav — Type a Salesforce ID (15 or 18 characters) or an object name to navigate directly. Includes autocomplete suggestions for standard objects (Account, Contact, Lead, Opportunity, Case, etc.).
Open in dropdown — Choose whether links open in the current tab, a new tab, or a new window.
Clean Up Groups — Merges duplicate tab groups in the current window.
Consolidate — Dropdown lists every tab group that exists in other browser windows. Select one (e.g., PROD, DEV) and click Consolidate to pull all tabs from that group across all windows into the current window. Sandbox tabs in other groups are left untouched.
Configure sandbox names in the options page (comma-separated, e.g. DEV, QA, UAT). They display with whatever casing you enter but URLs are always lowercase.

Tab Grouping by Environment
Automatically organizes Salesforce tabs into color-coded browser tab groups by environment. Production tabs go into a red PROD group, and each sandbox gets its own distinctly colored group (e.g., green DEV, blue QA).

Auto-grouping — Enable in options to automatically group every Salesforce tab as it loads
Manual grouping — Press Alt+Shift+G (Option+Shift+G on Mac) to sort all open Salesforce tabs into groups at once. Works even when auto-grouping is off.
Cross-window consolidation — Use the Consolidate dropdown in the popup to pick any tab group and pull all its tabs from other browser windows into the current one.
Tabs that navigate between environments are automatically moved to the correct group
Non-Salesforce tabs are never affected
Each browser window maintains its own set of groups
Empty groups are automatically removed by the browser
Keyboard Shortcuts
Shortcut	Action
Alt+S (Option+S on Mac)	Open the popup
Alt+Shift+G (Option+Shift+G on Mac)	Group all Salesforce tabs by environment
Alt+Shift+T (Option+Shift+T on Mac)	Pull all Salesforce tabs into current window and group
Remap shortcuts at chrome://extensions/shortcuts.

Installation
Chrome
Clone or download this repository
Open chrome://extensions/ in Chrome
Enable Developer Mode (toggle in the top right)
Click Load unpacked and select this directory
Open the extension's Options page to configure your production URL
Firefox
Clone or download this repository
Open about:debugging#/runtime/this-firefox in Firefox
Click Load Temporary Add-on
Select the manifest.json file from this directory
Open the extension's Options page to configure your production URL
Configuration
Open the extension options page to set:

Production URL — Your Salesforce production domain (e.g., myorg.lightning.force.com). The org name is extracted from the first segment of this URL and used for environment detection and navigation.
Sandbox Names — Comma-separated list of sandbox environment names (e.g., DEV, QA, UAT). These appear as buttons in the popup dashboard.
Tab Grouping — Toggle auto-grouping of Salesforce tabs by environment. Off by default.
Watermark settings — Toggle, font size, opacity, colors, and position.
Custom Targets — Up to 10 custom name/URL pairs. Paste a full Salesforce URL and the path is extracted automatically. Target names support flexible plural matching (site matches sites and vice versa).
All settings sync across browser instances via chrome.storage.sync.

Export / Import Settings
From the options page, you can Export your entire configuration as a sfnav-config.json file for backup or sharing, and Import a previously exported file to restore settings. Import validates the file before applying and reloads the page on success.

How Environment Detection Works
The extension determines the environment from the page hostname:

Production — Hostname starts with orgName. (e.g., myorg.lightning.force.com)
Sandbox — Hostname contains orgName-- (e.g., myorg--dev.sandbox.lightning.force.com), with the sandbox name extracted and displayed as the watermark label
Supported domains:

*.salesforce.com
*.lightning.force.com
*.salesforce-setup.com
Project Structure
├── manifest.json    # Extension configuration (Manifest V3)
├── content.js       # Watermark injection (runs on Salesforce pages)
├── background.js    # Omnibox navigation, tab grouping, and command handler
├── popup.html       # Popup dashboard UI
├── popup.js         # Popup dashboard logic
├── options.html     # Settings page UI
├── options.js       # Settings page logic
└── icons/           # Extension icons (16, 32, 48, 128px)
Development
No build tools required — vanilla JS, HTML, and CSS loaded directly by the browser.

After making changes:

Chrome: Go to chrome://extensions/ and click the reload button on the extension card
Firefox: Go to about:debugging#/runtime/this-firefox and click Reload
